title: `Azbuwq #5802
definition:
Azbuk = "strong devastation"

 1) father of Nehemiah, leader of half the district of Beth Zur, and
    a repairer of the walls of Jerusalem under another Nehemiah
nasbUsage:

 1) father of Nehemiah, leader of half the district of Beth Zur, and
    a repairer of the walls of Jerusalem under another Nehemiah
